title: Vrrip
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Vrrips''' were six legged bovines used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. They were used as beasts of burden, to carry baggage and pull carriages, and were used by members of the [[Worker caste]]. It is possible that the vrrip was considered a lesser creature than the [[quednak]], the usual beast of burden used by the Yuuzhan Vong.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
